design_system.name: Infæmous Freight Design System
design_system.description: A high-contrast, data-dense aesthetic inspired by logistics terminals, night highways, and industrial control panels. It prioritizes legibility in low-light environments and uses 'Hazard' colors for key actions.

usage_rules: Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all Headings (h1-h4) and massive stats.
Use 'Inter' for long-form text, descriptions, and UI labels.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for ALL numerical data: Prices, Load IDs, Dates, Weights, and Coordinates.

Button.base: rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest font-bold transition-all duration-200 active:scale-95

variants.outline: border-2 border-zinc-700 bg-transparent text-zinc-300 hover:border-amber-500 hover:text-amber-500

Input.base: bg-zinc-950 border-zinc-800 text-zinc-100 focus:border-amber-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-amber-500 rounded-sm placeholder:text-zinc-600

Badge.base: rounded-sm px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wider

landing_page.description: Asymmetrical, bold, high-impact. Use massive typography and negative space.
landing_page.hero_section: Full-screen height (min-h-screen). Background image with heavy dark overlay (bg-black/70). Centered or bottom-left aligned text.

dashboard.description: High density, grid-based. No wasted space. Use 'Grid Borders' to separate widgets.

dashboard_bg.alt: Aerial view of shipping container terminal
dashboard_bg.usage: Subtle overlay for dashboard or auth pages

texture_concrete.usage: Section backgrounds to break up the black

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px for elegance, 2px for active states.

motion.hover_effects: Use 'transition-all duration-200'. Avoid 'transition-all'. Animate specific properties (color, border-color, transform).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA (4.5:1) against the #0b0b10 background.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus ring: ring-2 ring-amber-500 ring-offset-2 ring-offset-black.

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors and font families defined in this JSON.
3. OVERRIDE SHADCN: When using Shadcn components, strip the default 'rounded-md' and replace with 'rounded-sm' or 'rounded-none' to match the industrial aesthetic.
4. DARK MODE DEFAULT: Force dark mode class on the html/body tag. Do not implement a light mode toggle unless strictly necessary (this is a dark-themed brand).
5. DATA-TESTID: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links) using kebab-case (e.g., 'login-submit-btn').
6. NO GRADIENTS: Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid colors or subtle noise textures.
7. BORDERS: Use 1px borders extensively to define structure. The 'Grid Border' look is key.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
